member.name: T:Railtracks.Exceptions.RailtracksException
member.summary: Base class for all Railtracks exceptions to inherit from. Ported from the Python RTError base class.

member.name: M:Railtracks.Exceptions.RailtracksException.Color(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Helper to colorize text for terminal output.

member.name: T:Railtracks.Llm.Attachment
member.summary: Represents an attachment to a message (image or PDF). Ported from the Python Attachment.

member.name: P:Railtracks.Llm.Attachment.UrlProbe
member.summary: Hook for HEAD-probing a URL with no usable extension, returning (contentType, filename). Defaults to a no-op that returns (null, null); tests/integrations can override. (The Python version uses urllib; in C# this is the injection seam.)

member.name: P:Railtracks.Llm.Attachment.Type
member.summary: The source kind: "local", "url", or "data_uri" (matches the Python type field).

member.name: T:Railtracks.Llm.ToolCall
member.summary: Represents the moment a tool is called. Ported from the Python pydantic ToolCall.

member.name: P:Railtracks.Llm.ToolCall.Identifier
member.summary: The identifier attached to this tool call.

member.name: P:Railtracks.Llm.ToolCall.Name
member.summary: The name of the tool being called.

member.name: P:Railtracks.Llm.ToolCall.Arguments
member.summary: The arguments provided as input to the tool.

member.name: T:Railtracks.Llm.ToolResponse
member.summary: Represents a tool response. Ported from the Python pydantic ToolResponse.

member.name: P:Railtracks.Llm.ToolResponse.Identifier
member.summary: The identifier attached to this tool response (matches the tool call's identifier).

member.name: P:Railtracks.Llm.ToolResponse.Name
member.summary: The name of the tool that generated this response.

member.name: P:Railtracks.Llm.ToolResponse.Result
member.summary: The result of the tool call.

member.name: T:Railtracks.Llm.Stream`1
member.summary: Represents a streaming response from a model. Ported from the Python Stream. The Python generator becomes an of chunk strings.
member.typeparam: The type of the final aggregated message (string or a structured model).

member.name: P:Railtracks.Llm.Stream`1.Streamer
member.summary: The streamer that yields response chunks.

member.name: P:Railtracks.Llm.Stream`1.FinalMessage
member.summary: The final message constructed once the streamer has finished.

member.name: T:Railtracks.Llm.AttachmentSource
member.summary: One of the three attachment source kinds. Ported from detect_source.

member.name: T:Railtracks.Llm.AttachmentEncoding
member.summary: Encoding/detection helpers for attachments. Ported from the Python railtracks.llm.encoding and attachment_formats modules.

member.name: P:Railtracks.Llm.AttachmentEncoding.UrlFetcher
member.summary: Hook for fetching the bytes of a URL. Defaults to . Tests override this to avoid in-process network I/O (the Python tests monkeypatch urllib; in C# the seam is this delegate).

member.name: M:Railtracks.Llm.AttachmentEncoding.DetectSource(System.String)
member.summary: Detects whether a string is a local file, URL, or data URI / base64 payload.

member.name: M:Railtracks.Llm.AttachmentEncoding.Encode(System.String,System.Double)
member.summary: Base64-encodes the bytes at a local path or URL. Ported from encode.

member.name: M:Railtracks.Llm.AttachmentEncoding.EnsureDataUri(System.String)
member.summary: If the input is a valid data URI, return it normalized; otherwise treat it as plain base64, sniff the MIME type, and construct a header. Ported from ensure_data_uri.

member.name: M:Railtracks.Llm.AttachmentEncoding.DetectMimeFromBytes(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Magic-byte MIME sniffing for the supported attachment formats. Ported from the Python detect_attachment_mime_from_bytes (which is driven by a YAML table).

member.name: T:Railtracks.Llm.LlmException
member.summary: Base class for all LLM exceptions. Ported from Python RTLLMError.

member.name: T:Railtracks.Llm.RetryException
member.summary: Raised when an error occurs during an LLM call that is being retried. Ported from Python RetryError.

member.name: T:Railtracks.Llm.Message
member.summary: Base class for a message an LLM can read. Ported from the Python generic Message. The content is held as since it may be a string, a list of , a , or a structured model.

member.name: M:Railtracks.Llm.Message.ValidateContent(System.Object)
member.summary: Override to validate the content type for a specific message subtype.

member.name: P:Railtracks.Llm.Message.Content
member.summary: The content of the message.

member.name: P:Railtracks.Llm.Message.Role
member.summary: The role of the message.

member.name: P:Railtracks.Llm.Message.InjectPrompt
member.summary: Whether this message should have context variables injected into it.

member.name: P:Railtracks.Llm.Message.ToolCalls
member.summary: The tool calls attached to this message, if any; otherwise an empty list.

member.name: T:Railtracks.Llm.StringOnlyMessage
member.summary: Base for messages that only accept string content. Ported from _StringOnlyContent.

member.name: P:Railtracks.Llm.StringOnlyMessage.Text
member.summary: The string content of this message.

member.name: M:Railtracks.Llm.StringOnlyMessage.FillPrompt(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Injects context variables into the content, replacing {key} placeholders.

member.name: T:Railtracks.Llm.UserMessage
member.summary: A user message. Only string content is supported. Ported from UserMessage.

member.name: M:Railtracks.Llm.UserMessage.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Double)
member.summary: Convenience constructor for a single attachment.

member.name: P:Railtracks.Llm.UserMessage.Attachment
member.summary: The file attachment(s) for this message, or null if none.

member.name: T:Railtracks.Llm.SystemMessage
member.summary: A system message. Ported from SystemMessage.

member.name: T:Railtracks.Llm.AssistantMessage
member.summary: A message from the assistant. Ported from AssistantMessage.

member.name: P:Railtracks.Llm.AssistantMessage.RawProviderMessage
member.summary: Optionally stores the raw provider message so providers that attach extra metadata (e.g. Gemini thought_signature) can round-trip it back. Ported from raw_litellm_message.

member.name: T:Railtracks.Llm.ToolMessage
member.summary: A message that is a tool call answer. Ported from ToolMessage.

member.name: P:Railtracks.Llm.ToolMessage.Response
member.summary: The tool response content.

member.name: T:Railtracks.Llm.MessageHistory
member.summary: A history of messages. Has all the capabilities of a (Add, Remove, ...). Ported from the Python MessageHistory(List[Message]).

member.name: M:Railtracks.Llm.MessageHistory.RemovedSystemMessages
member.summary: Returns a new with all system messages removed.

member.name: T:Railtracks.Llm.ModelBase
member.summary:
Base class for a model usable for chat, structured, and tool interactions. Ported from the Python ModelBase.
Supports pre-hooks (modify messages before sending), post-hooks (modify the response after receiving), and exception-hooks (observe exceptions). The Python sync/streaming generator overloads collapse to async-first methods here; streaming is deferred to a later slice. Concrete providers bind to Microsoft.Extensions.AI.IChatClient.

member.name: M:Railtracks.Llm.ModelBase.ModelName
member.summary: The name of the model being used.

member.name: M:Railtracks.Llm.ModelBase.ModelProviderName
member.summary: The provider that owns the model.

member.name: M:Railtracks.Llm.ModelBase.ModelGateway
member.summary: The API distributor of the model (not necessarily the same as the provider).

member.name: T:Railtracks.Llm.ModelProvider
member.summary: Supported LLM model providers. Ported from the Python ModelProvider(str, Enum). The string matches the Python enum values (some of which differ from the member name, e.g. Gemini -> "Vertex_AI").

member.name: T:Railtracks.Llm.PromptInjection
member.summary: Minimal prompt-injection formatter. Ported from the Python KeyOnlyFormatter: substitutes {key} placeholders from the provided values while leaving unknown placeholders untouched (so partial fills don't raise).

member.name: T:Railtracks.Llm.MessageInfo
member.summary: Additional information about a model response. Ported from the Python MessageInfo.

member.name: P:Railtracks.Llm.MessageInfo.TotalTokens
member.summary: The total tokens used, or null if either input or output token count is missing.

member.name: T:Railtracks.Llm.Response
member.summary: A response from a model: the returned message plus metadata. Ported from Response.

member.name: P:Railtracks.Llm.Response.Message
member.summary: The message returned as part of this response.

member.name: P:Railtracks.Llm.Response.MessageInfo
member.summary: Additional information about the message (tokens, latency, ...).

member.name: T:Railtracks.Llm.Role
member.summary: Represents the role of a message. Ported from the Python Role(str, Enum).

member.name: T:Railtracks.Llm.RoleExtensions
member.summary: Helpers for mapping to/from its wire string value (e.g. Role.Assistant <-> "assistant").

member.name: M:Railtracks.Llm.RoleExtensions.Value(Railtracks.Llm.Role)
member.summary: The lowercase string value of the role (matches the Python enum value).

member.name: T:Railtracks.Llm.Tools.ArrayParameter
member.summary: Parameter representing an array type. Ported from ArrayParameter.

member.name: T:Railtracks.Llm.Tools.DocstringParser
member.summary: Utilities for parsing Google-style docstrings to extract parameter descriptions and the main description. Ported from the Python docstring_parser module.

member.name: M:Railtracks.Llm.Tools.DocstringParser.ParamFromClrType(System.Type,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a from a CLR type. Ported from param_from_python_type.

member.name: M:Railtracks.Llm.Tools.DocstringParser.ParseDocstringArgs(System.String)
member.summary: Parses the "Args:" section, mapping parameter names to descriptions.

member.name: M:Railtracks.Llm.Tools.DocstringParser.ExtractArgsSection(System.String)
member.summary: Extracts the raw "Args:" section text from a docstring.

member.name: M:Railtracks.Llm.Tools.DocstringParser.ParseArgsSection(System.String)
member.summary: Parses an "Args:" section into a parameter-name -> description map.

member.name: M:Railtracks.Llm.Tools.DocstringParser.ExtractMainDescription(System.String)
member.summary: Extracts the main description (everything before the first section marker).

member.name: T:Railtracks.Llm.Tools.ObjectParameter
member.summary: Parameter representing an object type. Ported from ObjectParameter.

member.name: T:Railtracks.Llm.Tools.ParameterType
member.summary: JSON-schema parameter types. Ported from the Python ParameterType(str, Enum).

member.name: M:Railtracks.Llm.Tools.ParameterTypeExtensions.Value(Railtracks.Llm.Tools.ParameterType)
member.summary: The JSON-schema string value (matches the Python enum value).

member.name: M:Railtracks.Llm.Tools.ParameterTypeExtensions.FromClrType(System.Type)
member.summary: Maps a CLR type to a . Ported from from_python_type.

member.name: T:Railtracks.Llm.Tools.Parameter
member.summary: Base parameter with default simple-parameter behavior. Ported from the Python Parameter ABC (which is directly instantiable since it has no abstract members).

member.name: P:Railtracks.Llm.Tools.Parameter.ParamType
member.summary: The schema type: a , a List<string> (union), or null.

member.name: M:Railtracks.Llm.Tools.Parameter.NormalizeScalar(System.Object)
member.summary: Maps a ParameterType enum, schema string, or CLR type to a schema type string.

member.name: T:Railtracks.Llm.Tools.RefParameter
member.summary: Parameter representing a JSON-schema reference. Ported from RefParameter.

member.name: T:Railtracks.Llm.Tools.SchemaParser
member.summary: Parses JSON-schema property dictionaries into instances. Ported from the Python schema_parser module. Schema objects are represented as IReadOnlyDictionary<string, object?> (matching a deserialized JSON object).

member.name: M:Railtracks.Llm.Tools.SchemaParser.ParseJsonSchemaToParameter(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Parse a JSON-schema property dict into the appropriate subtype.

member.name: M:Railtracks.Llm.Tools.SchemaParser.ParseModelProperties(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Returns the top-level properties of a (pydantic-style) JSON schema as parameters.

member.name: T:Railtracks.Llm.Tools.Tool
member.summary: A quasi-immutable representation of a single tool: name, description, and parameters. Ported from the Python Tool.

member.name: M:Railtracks.Llm.Tools.Tool.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Constructs a tool from a JSON-schema dictionary (with "properties"/"required"), matching the Python overload that accepts a schema dict.

member.name: M:Railtracks.Llm.Tools.Tool.FromMethod(System.Reflection.MethodInfo,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Creates a from a method via reflection. The C# analog of the Python from_function: parameter types come from the signature, required-ness from the presence of a default value, and descriptions from the supplied (C# has no runtime docstrings, so descriptions are provided explicitly).

member.name: M:Railtracks.Llm.Tools.Tool.FromDelegate(System.Delegate,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Convenience overload that builds a tool from a delegate's target method.

member.name: T:Railtracks.Llm.Tools.ToolCreationException
member.summary: Exception raised when a tool cannot be created. Ported from ToolCreationError.

member.name: T:Railtracks.Llm.Tools.UnionParameter
member.summary: Parameter representing a union type. Ported from UnionParameter.
